title: Lateral Movement via Admin Shares / PsExec
description: Detects access to administrative shares (ADMIN$/C$/IPC$) via 5145/5140, consistent with PsExec-style lateral movement.
author: SOC Team

qradar.rule_name: SOC-006: Lateral Movement via Admin Shares / PsExec

aql: SELECT sourceip AS src_ip, username AS account, destinationip AS target_host, DATEFORMAT(starttime, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss') AS event_time, UTF8(payload) AS raw_event FROM events WHERE UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%AgentLogFile=Security%' AND ( UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%EventID=5145%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%EventID=5140%' ) AND ( UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%ADMIN$%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%C$%' OR UTF8(payload) ILIKE '%IPC$%' ) AND username NOT ILIKE '%$' ORDER BY starttime DESC LAST 15 MINUTES
